description: Join Binance P2P's second anniversary livestream to celebrate and win rewards. Engage with the community, share your experiences, and learn about the impact of Binance P2P on users and merchants.
topic_summary: Celebrating Binance P2P's second anniversary with community engagement and sharing success stories. [t=0:00] Introduction and welcome. [t=1:00] Sharing experiences and stories from users. [t=2:00] Introduction of panelists and discussion.
